# Pull Request

## Description
A clear and concise description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Accessibility improvement
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Test addition/update

## Related Issues
Fixes #(issue number)
Closes #(issue number)
Related to #(issue number)

## Changes Made
- Change 1
- Change 2
- Change 3

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] End-to-end tests added/updated
- [ ] Accessibility tests performed
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] All tests pass

### Test Details
Describe the testing performed:
- Tested with screen readers: [e.g. NVDA, JAWS, VoiceOver]
- Tested with keyboard navigation
- Tested with high contrast mode
- Tested with different browsers
- Tested with different operating systems

## Accessibility Considerations
- [ ] Screen reader compatibility verified
- [ ] Keyboard navigation tested
- [ ] Voice commands tested (if applicable)
- [ ] High contrast mode tested
- [ ] Mobile accessibility tested
- [ ] WCAG guidelines followed
- [ ] ARIA labels added where needed
- [ ] Semantic HTML used appropriately

## Screenshots/Videos
If applicable, add screenshots or videos to help explain your changes.

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published
- [ ] I have tested the changes with multiple assistive technologies
- [ ] I have considered the impact on existing users
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md if necessary

## Additional Notes
Add any additional notes or context about the PR here.

## Breaking Changes
If this PR contains breaking changes, describe them here and provide migration instructions.

## Performance Impact
If this PR affects performance, describe the impact and any optimizations made.

## Security Considerations
If this PR affects security, describe the security implications and any measures taken.

## Dependencies
If this PR adds or updates dependencies, list them here:
- Dependency 1
- Dependency 2
- Dependency 3

## Deployment Notes
If this PR requires special deployment steps, describe them here.

## Rollback Plan
If this PR needs to be rolled back, describe the rollback plan here.
